<!-- indicator: tbl-agop-hosp-0-4 -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-agop-hosp-0-4
#| tbl-cap: 'Asthma, Gastroenteritis, Otitis Media, and Pneumonia Hospitalizations, Rate per 10,000 Population Aged 0–4 Years, 2020–2022'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-agop-hosp-0-4", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-agop-hosp-0-4", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
